ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was admitted */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique medical record number for the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* The insurance provider for the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "primary_physician" TEXT /* Primary physician responsible for the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "chronic_conditions" TEXT /* Chronic conditions of the patient */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_admissions" (
  "hadm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital admission */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient admitted */,
  "admission_time" TEXT /* Time of admission */,
  "discharge_time" TEXT /* Time of discharge */,
  "admission_type" TEXT /* Type of admission (e.g., emergency, elective) */,
  "discharge_status" TEXT /* Status of the patient at discharge (e.g., discharged, transferred, deceased) */,
  "admission_source" TEXT /* Source of the admission (e.g., ER, referral, transfer) */,
  "admission_diagnosis" TEXT /* Initial diagnosis at the time of admission */,
  "discharge_diagnosis" TEXT /* Final diagnosis at the time of discharge */,
  "admission_department" TEXT /* Department where the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_department" TEXT /* Department where the patient was discharged from */,
  "attending_physician" TEXT /* Attending physician during the hospital stay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hadm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_admissions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES patients ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icu_stays" (
  "icustay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICU stay */,
  "hadm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital admission */,
  "icu_admission_time" TEXT /* Time of ICU admission */,
  "icu_discharge_time" TEXT /* Time of ICU discharge */,
  "icu_department" TEXT /* Specific ICU department (e.g., Cardiac ICU, Neuro ICU) */,
  "icu_bed_number" TEXT /* Bed number in the ICU */,
  "icu_bed_type" TEXT /* Type of bed (e.g., regular, isolation) */,
  "icu_nurse_in_charge" TEXT /* Nurse in charge of the ICU stay */,
  "icu_condition_on_admission" TEXT /* Condition of the patient on ICU admission */,
  "icu_condition_on_discharge" TEXT /* Condition of the patient on ICU discharge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icustay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_stays_hadm_id FOREIGN KEY ("hadm_id") REFERENCES hospital_admissions ("hadm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vital_signs" (
  "itemid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vital sign measurement */,
  "icustay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ICU stay during which it was recorded */,
  "charttime" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was taken */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the vital sign */,
  "valueuom" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., mmHg, bpm) */,
  "first_entry" TEXT /* Timestamp of the first entry for reference */,
  "secs_since_entry" INTEGER /* Seconds since the first entry was recorded */,
  "recorded_by" TEXT /* Healthcare professional who recorded the vital sign */,
  "recording_device" TEXT /* Device used to record the vital sign */,
  "recording_location" TEXT /* Location where the vital sign was recorded (e.g., bedside, central monitoring) */,
  "recording_method" TEXT /* Method used to record the vital sign (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("itemid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_icustay_id FOREIGN KEY ("icustay_id") REFERENCES icu_stays ("icustay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "med_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "hadm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital admission */,
  "med_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage administered */,
  "administration_time" TEXT /* Time the medication was administered */,
  "prescribed_by" TEXT /* Physician who prescribed the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, IV) */,
  "administration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration (e.g., once daily, every 4 hours) */,
  "administration_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the medication administration */,
  "administration_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or special instructions for administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("med_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_hadm_id FOREIGN KEY ("hadm_id") REFERENCES hospital_admissions ("hadm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nurses" (
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nurse */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the nurse */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the nurse */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift assigned to the nurse (e.g., day, night) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Nurse's license number */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the nurse has been practicing */,
  "shift_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the nurse's shift */,
  "shift_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the nurse's shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nurse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nurse_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nurse assignment */,
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assigned nurse */,
  "icustay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ICU stay of the patient */,
  "assignment_time" TEXT /* Time the nurse was assigned to the patient */,
  "assignment_end_time" TEXT /* Time the nurse's assignment ends */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or special instructions for the assignment */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* Healthcare professional who assigned the nurse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nurse_assignments_icustay_id FOREIGN KEY ("icustay_id") REFERENCES icu_stays ("icustay_id")
)
